title: Tetradema clarkei

It is a member of the genus Tetradema, which consists of shrubs and small trees. The classification of Tetradema clarkei is further grouped into the kingdom Plantae, and the phylum Magnoliophyta. The plant is valued for its traditional medicinal uses, which include treating fever, rheumatism, and other inflammatory conditions, due to its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties.
